title: German-Style Gluten-Free Bacon Bake
description: A hearty, comforting casserole featuring bacon, malty flavors, and a dense texture, all within a gluten-free framework.
instructions: 2. Cook bacon in a pan until crispy, then set aside.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together malty, dense, and german ingredients.
4. Add the cooked bacon to the bowl and stir to combine.
5. Pour the mixture into a baking dish and top with additional malty, if desired.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
7. Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
